nasb.text: So he went and did according to the word of the Lord, for he went and lived by the brook Cherith, which is east of the Jordan.

esv.text: So he went and did according to the word of the Lord. He went and lived by the brook Cherith that is east of the Jordan.

cnv.text: 於是以利亞去了，照著耶和華的話行了；他去住在約旦河東面的基立溪旁。

ccb.text: 以利亚遵从耶和华的话，到约旦河东的基立溪旁住下来。
